channel.title: Homes on Jeremias Knoblauch
channel.description: Recent content in Homes on Jeremias Knoblauch

item.description: About me I am a postgraduate researcher working at the boundary of computer science and statistics within the Oxford-Warwick Statistics Programme (OxWaSP). I am jointly supervised by Theodoros Damoulas and Chenlei Leng. My research is part of the Clean Air London project at the Turing Institute to support London’s Major’s office with data-driven policy.
